---
name: Refactor Pull Request
about: Use this template for pull requests that refactor existing code in Myna to improve maintainability, performance, or readability without changing external behavior.
title: '[Refactor] Short descriptive title here'
labels: refactor
assignees: ''
---

## Summary
<!-- Briefly describe the refactoring being done and its purpose. -->

## Related Issues/Pull Requests
<!-- Link any related issues or pull requests here. Use `Closes` to automatically close issues when this PR is merged. Use `Related to` to link without closing. Use `Depends on` to indicate dependencies. -->

> [!NOTE]
> All refactor PRs should link to at least one issue describing the motivation for the refactor.

- Closes: #
- Related to: #
- Depends on: #

## Summary of Changes
<!-- List the main changes made in this pull request. Focus on what was changed and why. -->


## Testing
<!-- Describe how the refactor was tested, including any new tests added or manual verification steps. -->

## Documentation
<!-- Describe any documentation updates made to support this refactor. -->

## Checklist
<!-- Please review the checklist and ensure all items are addressed before submitting the pull request. Mark [X] for completed items. -->

- [ ] Linked issues/PRs are set (Closes/Related to/Depends on)
- [ ] Tests added/updated or rationale provided
- [ ] Documentation updated or marked not needed
- [ ] Reviewer focus areas provided
